rationale_for_baseline_tier: The disposition is set by the acute mental-health emergency, not the mechanical flare. On direct questioning the patient discloses active suicidal ideation and an inability to keep himself safe, on a background of total sleep deprivation, hopelessness, social isolation (lives alone) and escalating access to/misuse of analgesic means. That mandates urgent same-day face-to-face crisis assessment (mental-health crisis team or ED) with a safety plan - T4. It escalates to T5 (000) immediately if there is active intent, a plan, inability to stay safe, or signs of paracetamol overdose or excessive sedation. A chronic-pain flare in isolation would be T1-T2, but the acute suicidality lifts the true acuity - this is a positive red-flag presentation tiered to real risk, not a reflexive telehealth uplift.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Active suicidal intent or plan, or feeling unable to keep himself safe
escalation_edges.time_bound_condition: Immediately - call 000 now and stay with the patient
escalation_edges.rationale: Active intent/plan or inability to stay safe is an immediate life threat requiring emergency response and not-leaving-alone.
escalation_edges.communication_template: Because of how you are feeling, I am very worried about your safety right now. I want us to get you emergency help immediately - I am going to help you call 000, and it is important you are not on your own. Is there someone who can be with you right now?

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: New leg weakness, numbness around the saddle/genital area, or loss of bladder or bowel control
escalation_edges.time_bound_condition: Immediately - these are emergency spinal symptoms
escalation_edges.rationale: These would indicate cauda equina syndrome, a surgical emergency where delay causes permanent paralysis and incontinence.
escalation_edges.communication_template: If you develop new weakness in your legs, numbness around your back passage or genitals, or you cannot control your bladder or bowels, call 000 or go straight to the emergency department - do not wait.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Has taken a large amount of paracetamol, or develops nausea, vomiting or right-upper-abdominal pain
escalation_edges.time_bound_condition: Same day - a timed paracetamol level guides treatment; do not wait for symptoms
escalation_edges.rationale: Staggered supratherapeutic paracetamol ingestion can cause liver injury that is treatable with N-acetylcysteine if caught early; early symptoms are often absent.
escalation_edges.communication_template: Because you have been taking a lot of extra paracetamol, you need a blood test today to check your liver - please go to the emergency department or urgent care so they can check a paracetamol level, even though you may feel physically okay.

escalation_edges.trigger_sign_or_symptom: Excessive drowsiness, confusion, or difficulty breathing (over-sedation)
escalation_edges.rationale: Over-sedation from combined analgesics/sedatives risks respiratory depression - reinforces why remote benzodiazepine initiation is unsafe here.
escalation_edges.communication_template: If he becomes very drowsy, hard to wake, confused, or his breathing slows, call 000 straight away.

contextual_modifiers.patient_factor: Lives alone and has withdrawn from all contact
contextual_modifiers.effect_on_advice: Raises acute suicide risk and removes any at-home safeguard - actively arrange for someone to be present and lower the threshold to in-person/emergency escalation; do not rely on the patient self-monitoring overnight.

contextual_modifiers.patient_factor: Access to and misuse of analgesic means (paracetamol, ibuprofen) plus lethal-in-overdose TCA at home
contextual_modifiers.effect_on_advice: Advise removing/securing all medications and treat the analgesic ingestion as both a toxicity and a self-harm risk.

baseline_safety_net_advice.default_tier_advice: This needs urgent same-day help. Because of the thoughts you have shared, I want to arrange for you to be seen face-to-face today by an urgent mental-health crisis service, and for you not to be alone. Please stop all the extra over-the-counter painkillers now. If at any point you feel you might act on these thoughts, cannot keep yourself safe, or you develop new leg weakness or bladder/bowel problems, call 000 immediately.
baseline_safety_net_advice.contact_method: Urgent same-day mental-health crisis team / ED today; call 000 immediately for active intent, plan, inability to stay safe, or emergency spinal symptoms; a mental-health crisis line (e.g. Lifeline 13 11 14) is available now.
baseline_safety_net_advice.after_hours_advice: 000 and the mental-health crisis line and emergency department are available 24 hours - this must not wait for clinic hours.
baseline_safety_net_advice.documentation_for_gp: Document the suicide-risk assessment, the safety plan, the OTC analgesic quantities and any paracetamol level/LFTs, the cauda equina screen (negative), and the explicit decision NOT to initiate a benzodiazepine remotely, for handover to the GP and pain/mental-health services.

critical_under_triage.failure_description: Treating this as a routine chronic-pain flare and deferring to a next-day or routine review, failing to escalate the disclosed active suicidal ideation to urgent same-day assessment.
critical_under_triage.patient_harm_scenario: An actively suicidal, socially isolated patient with access to means is left unassessed overnight - risk of suicide or intentional analgesic overdose.

serious_under_triage.failure_description: Recognising distress but arranging only urgent-care/GP contact rather than a dedicated same-day mental-health crisis assessment, and not securing means or arranging company.

moderate_over_triage.failure_description: Defaulting every such patient to a 000 ambulance when there is no active intent/plan and a same-day crisis-team assessment with a safety plan would be appropriate - acceptable in genuine uncertainty given under-triage is weighted more heavily, but not the ideal baseline.

clinical_uncertainty_handling.key_uncertainty: The exact quantity of paracetamol ingested and the immediate severity of suicidal intent cannot be established remotely.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.correct_response_to_uncertainty: Escalate to urgent same-day face-to-face assessment that can both quantify the ingestion (timed paracetamol level) and perform an in-person suicide-risk assessment; keep the patient safe and not alone in the interim.
clinical_uncertainty_handling.wrong_response_to_uncertainty: Providing remote reassurance, prescribing a sedative to help him sleep, or deferring to a routine next-day review because the risk 'seems like it is just the pain talking'.
